title: Phyllorkis dearei
taxonomy: Phyllorkis dearei is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family is commonly known as the orchid family, which comprises over 30,000 species of orchids. Phyllorkis dearei is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Phyllorkis is also part of the orchid family and consists of several species of orchids. The exact classification of Phyllorkis dearei can be broken down into its full scientific name, which is Phyllorkis dearei (Rolfe) King & Pantl.

intro: Phyllorkis dearei, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Phyllorkis dearei contains bioactive constituents like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
